summary: Licensed game-engine data for AI world models and robotics simulation.
editor_note: The interesting bet is that world models need game-engine state, not scraped video. Origin Lab captures HUD-free gameplay with depth, action, camera, scene metadata, 20+ categories, 50+ licensed titles, and same-day API access for evals. Compared with web video datasets, this has rights provenance and physics-adjacent telemetry. The hard part is whether game worlds transfer to messy real-world robotics.
